title: Innum Enna Onnum Vendame Song Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
<div>
Innum Enna Onnum Vendame Song Lyrics in Tamil, unofficial  tamil version of  Inkem Inkem kaavale Telugu Song. Innum Enna Onnum Vendame, I am trying to translate inkem inkem song lyrics in tamil as I am eager to know the meaning of the telugu song.

This NOT an official lyrics, I just tried my own for the love of this song.
Innum Enna Onnum Vendame: Inkem Inkem Song Lyrics in Tamil.  இன்னும் என்ன ஒன்னும் வேண்டாமே
போதுமே இது போதுமே
நீயே என் அருகில்வந்தாயே
இனிமேல் திருநாளே.

இதயத்தில் வேகம்
அதிகரிக்க செய்தாய்.
வீட்டினுள்ளே பல
வண்ணம் தூவினாய்.

வேறென்ன வேண்டும்
நீ அருகில் இருந்தால் போதும்
ஒவ்வொரு நொடியும்
ஒரு வருடம் ஆகிறதே.
மீண்டும் பிறந்து
இறந்து போவேனே.. நான்

வேறென்ன வேறென்ன வேண்டும்
போதுமே இது போதுமே
நீயே என் அருகில் வந்தாய்
இனிமேல் திருநாளே.

கற்பனைக்கு எட்டாத வடிவம்
உயிரை விடாதா மூச்சு
என் மனதில் என்னவென்று
உனக்கு தெறியுமா

உன் கண்ணிலுள்ள வெளிச்சம்
குறைத்து என்னுடைய வயசை
ஏதோ , இது ஒரு கனவு
போலே தோணுதே ..

உன்னை வந்து
உடனே   பாக்கணுமே
பார்த்தவுடன்
வானத்தில் பறப்பேனே....

இன்னும் என்ன ஒன்னும் வேண்டாமே
போதுமே இது போதுமே
நீயே என் அருகில்வந்தாயே
இனிமேல் திருநாளே.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Innum Enna Onnum Vendame?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

Is Innum Enna Onnum Vendame an official Tamil song?

No, it is an unofficial Tamil version of the Telugu song Inkem Inkem from the movie Geetha Govindam.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of romance, nostalgia, and a soothing sense of longing.

When was the movie Geetha Govindam released?

The movie Geetha Govindam was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Innum Enna Onnum Vendame is a Tamil adaptation of the popular Telugu song Inkem Inkem from the movie Geetha Govindam. It beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, resonating with those who appreciate romantic melodies. The soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics make it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. Although unofficial, this version has gained popularity for its emotional depth and connection to the original film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Innum Enna Onnum Vendame, a Tamil rendition of the beloved Telugu hit. This unofficial version captures the essence of romance and longing, beautifully intertwined with the narrative of Geetha Govindam. Dive into the soothing vibes and heartfelt emotions that make this song a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: This is not official lyrics, I just tried my own for the love of this song. Innum Enna Onnum Vendame: Inkem Inkem Song Lyrics in Tamil. I don't need anything else, this is enough, you came close to me, from now on it's a festival.
You made my heart beat faster. You spread many colors inside the house.
What else do I need if you are near me? Every moment feels like a year. I will be born and die again.. I will.
What else, what else do I need? This is enough, you came close to me, from now on it's a festival.
A form beyond imagination, won't you leave my breath? Do you know what's in my mind?
The light in your eyes dims my age, it feels like a dream..
I must come and see you immediately, as soon as I see you, I will fly in the sky...
I don't need anything else, this is enough, you came close to me, from now on it's a festival.
